title: DuckDB read/write split
boundary: DuckDB write-capable client extraction and projection worker fix
consumer_purpose: Enable the DuckDB projection worker to write DDL to a persistent DuckDB database, eliminate table/view name collision, remove duplicate execDuckDB code, and log errors instead of swallowing them.
claim_atoms: Projection worker DDL succeeds against persistent DuckDB databases; _ctx_file_relevance no longer names both a TABLE and a VIEW; No Effect.ignore chains remain in duckdb-projection-worker.ts; execDuckDB functions defined once in duckdb-exec.ts; DuckDB.Service remains read-only; All existing tests pass unchanged
revision_reason: Check plan exists and is accessible
